marketing.heroTitle:
Let AI craft your
perfect journey
marketing.heroSubtitle: Smart itinerary generation, real-time dynamic adjustment, and community sharing. Solving the three pain points of travel: hard to plan, frequent changes, lagging info.
marketing.featuresSubtitle: Three core modules forming a smart travel loop
marketing.feature1Desc: Enter destination and preferences, AI generates tight or relaxed itineraries with drag-and-drop editing
marketing.feature2Desc: Weather, traffic, and crowd alerts with smart alternatives so plans can keep up with change
marketing.feature3Desc: Users report real experiences, verified by geo-fencing and cross-validation, feeding back to optimize the model
marketing.aiDemoSubtitle: From spot filtering and time allocation to conflict avoidance, every step is grounded
marketing.ctaSubtitle: Join TripAI and make every trip flawless

trip.title: Trip Planning
trip.subtitle: Create and manage your AI smart trips
trip.noNodes: No nodes yet. Click "Create Trip" to start.
trip.empty: You have no trips yet. Create your first one.

ai.title: AI Travel Assistant
ai.placeholder: Tell me your travel needs and I'll help plan
ai.welcome: Hi! I'm your AI travel assistant. I can plan trips, look up spots, and handle on-the-go changes. Where would you like to go?
ai.quickAsk2: Any fun spots near Hangzhou this weekend?
ai.quickAsk3: How to adjust outdoor plans on rainy days?
ai.inputHint: Enter to send · Shift + Enter for newline

aiSettings.title: AI Provider Settings
aiSettings.description: Choose an AI provider or add your own API. Settings are stored locally in your browser only.
aiSettings.name: Name
